name: Construct: East Room 1
description:
Completing this mission will instantly build a new structure on your home island.

Craft a Miner's Cameo from simple tools and common building materials.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

New Structure: east Room 1.  A hollow chamber east of the island's center to serve as a multipurpose space, with tons of room to expand.

effect.u_message:
Now that you have corridors snaking beneath your island, you could build rooms in various areas.  The eastern quadrant might be a good place for another room.
A new recipe has been learned.  Craft this artifact to permanently upgrade the island.

New Structure: East Room 1.  A hollow chamber to the east of the island's center to serve as a multipurpose space, with tons of room to expand.
Construction complete.  A room has been dug out to the east of the central area in the bunker beneath the island.

description:
This strange metaphysical artifact is used to build a structure on the island.  Will be used automatically upon crafting, and can only be used once.

ASSOCIATED BUILD: East Room 1

name: Construct: East Room 2
description:
Completing this mission will instantly build a new structure on your home island.

Craft a Hollow Carver from simple tools and common building materials.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

New Structure: East Room 2.  Expand the eastern room to fit more loot, furniture, or anything else you may need.

effect.u_message:
The eastern room would be a lot more useful if it were larger.  Time to get to work.
A new recipe has been learned.  Craft this artifact to permanently upgrade the island.

New Structure: East Room 2.  Expand the eastern room to fit more loot, furniture, or anything else you may need.
Construction complete.  The eastern room has grown.

description:
This strange metaphysical artifact is used to build a structure on the island.  Will be used automatically upon crafting, and can only be used once.

ASSOCIATED BUILD: East Room 2

name: Construct: East Room 3
description:
Completing this mission will instantly build a new structure on your home island.

Craft a Warped Reinforcement from simple tools and common building materials.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

New Structure: East Room 3.  Expand the eastern room to very generous dimensions.

effect.u_message:
The eastern room is a good start, but it could be much bigger.  Time to get to work.
A new recipe has been learned.  Craft this artifact to permanently upgrade the island.

New Structure: East Room 3.  Expand the eastern room to very generous dimensions.
Construction complete.  The eastern room has grown even further.

description:
This strange metaphysical artifact is used to build a structure on the island.  Will be used automatically upon crafting, and can only be used once.

ASSOCIATED BUILD: east Room 3

name: Construct: east Room Gallery
description:
Completing this mission will instantly build a new structure on your home island.

Craft a Crystalline Glass from simple tools and common building materials.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

New Structure: east Room Gallery.  Add an enclosed gallery to the eastern room to allow viewing off the side of the island.

effect.u_message:
The eastern room is a nice size, but you're on a floating island.  What if you had a place where you could admire the beautiful view without having to worry about the blowing winds?  Time to get to work.
A new recipe has been learned.  Craft this artifact to permanently upgrade the island.

New Structure: East Room Gallery.  Add an enclosed gallery to the eastern room to allow viewing off the side of the island.
Construction complete.  The eastern room has now has a viewing gallery.

description:
This strange metaphysical artifact is used to build a structure on the island.  Will be used automatically upon crafting, and can only be used once.

ASSOCIATED BUILD: East Room Gallery

name: Construct: East Side Rooms
description:
Completing this mission will instantly build a new structure on your home island.

Craft an Inverted Cube from simple tools and common building materials.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

New Structure: East Side Rooms.  Add two rooms on either side of the corridor leading to the eastern room.

effect.u_message:
The eastern room is a nice size, but it's just one room.  You could use a bit of separation between activities, and maybe a place to store some materials that you won't use as often.  Time to get to work.
A new recipe has been learned.  Craft this artifact to permanently upgrade the island.

New Structure: East Side Rooms.  Add two side rooms in the east for additional storage.
Construction complete.  The east now has two side rooms for additional storage.

description:
This strange metaphysical artifact is used to build a structure on the island.  Will be used automatically upon crafting, and can only be used once.

ASSOCIATED BUILD: East Side Rooms
